hooks.name: Regenerate Plugin Docs After Dev Build
hooks.description: After a spec task completes on a dev plugin build, prompts the agent to regenerate the HTML documentation and update the docs site index.

action.prompt:
A plugin build/update task just completed. If this was a dev build in the plugins repo (~/Documents/GitHub/plugins), do the following:

1. Identify which plugin was modified (check recent git changes or the task context)
2. Regenerate the HTML documentation for that plugin using the `generate-plugin-html-docs` skill:
   - Read the plugin's plugin.spec.yaml
   - Generate a self-contained HTML file at docs/<plugin_name>.html
   - Follow the full style template (sidebar, setup, permissions, actions, types, version history)
3. Update docs/index.html:
   - Update the version number shown for the plugin in the sidebar and plugin cards
   - If this is a new plugin, add it to both the sidebar navigation (with section dropdown) and the home page plugin grid
4. Commit the doc changes: `git add docs/ && git commit -m "docs: Regenerate <plugin_name> documentation" && git push origin main`

If this was NOT a dev build (e.g., it was a prod build on insightconnect-plugins), skip this step entirely.
